patthana9.15:1.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nanadassanena pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:2.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.15:3.1.pli: Nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nanabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.15:5.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nanadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nanabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

(Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.15:18.1.pli: Nasauttaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… naanuttaraṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:19.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.15:20.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.15:21.1.pli: Naaraṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nakusalo ca naaraṇo nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.15:22.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nakusalañca naaraṇaṁ nakusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:23.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.15:24.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:26.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.15:27.1.pli: Naaraṇaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.15:28.1.pli: Hetuyā dve, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate dve.

patthana9.16:1.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nasaraṇaṁ nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nasaraṇaṁ naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.16:2.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.16:3.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ navipākaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.16:5.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate dve.

patthana9.16:6.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naupādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.16:7.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naanupādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana9.16:8.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naanupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.17:1.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.17:2.1.pli: Naaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca naaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.17:3.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca naaraṇaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.17:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.17:5.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.17:6.1.pli: Naaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho ca naaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.17:7.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca naaraṇaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.17:8.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.17:10.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaraṇo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.17:11.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā sahajāte aññamaññe nissaye kamme …pe… magge vippayutte atthiyā avigate ekaṁ. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana9.2:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.2:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.2:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.3:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ navipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava. Vipāke ekaṁ.)

patthana9.3:16.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nadassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana9.3:17.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana9.3:18.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava. Vipākaṁ natthi.)

patthana9.3:19.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana9.3:20.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana9.3:21.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava. Vipākaṁ natthi.)

patthana9.4:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevaācayagāmiṁ nāpacayagāmiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava. Vipākaṁ natthi.)

patthana9.4:18.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe…. (Sabbattha nava. Vipākaṁ natthi.)

patthana9.5:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.5:2.1.pli: Nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.5:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu nasanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.5:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.5:6.1.pli: Nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.5:7.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca nanahetuṁ naanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.5:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… avigate nava. (Sahajātavārepi …pe… sampayuttavārepi sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana9.5:9.1.pli: Nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo nanahetussa naanidassanasappaṭighassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo nahetussa naanidassanasappaṭighassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Nanahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo nahetussa naanidassanasappaṭighassa ca nanahetussa naanidassanasappaṭighassa ca dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana9.5:10.1.pli: Nahetu naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo nahetussa naanidassanasappaṭighassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.5:11.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe nava …pe… upanissaye nava, purejāte pacchājāte tīṇi, āsevane nava, kamme tīṇi, vipāke nava, āhāre tīṇi, indriye nava, jhāne tīṇi, magge sampayutte nava, vippayutte pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Pañhāvāraṁ evaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana9.5:12.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.5:13.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā sahajāte aññamaññe nissaye kamme …pe… magge ekaṁ, vippayutte atthiyā avigate ekaṁ. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana9.6:1.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā—vicikicchāsahagataṁ uddhaccasahagataṁ mohaṁ paṭicca cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ, ekaṁ mahābhūtaṁ paṭicca tayo mahābhūtā …pe… dve mahābhūte …pe… nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā—vicikicchāsahagataṁ uddhaccasahagataṁ mohaṁ paṭicca sampayuttakā khandhā; paṭisandhikkhaṇe vatthuṁ paṭicca sahetukā khandhā. Nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko nakusalo ca naahetuko nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.6:2.1.pli: Naahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana9.6:3.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ nakusalañca naahetukaṁ nakusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.6:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.6:5.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana9.6:6.1.pli: Naahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana9.6:7.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naakusalañca naahetukaṁ naakusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.6:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.6:9.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.6:10.1.pli: Naahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana9.6:11.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naabyākatañca naahetukaṁ naabyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.6:12.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe pañca, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.7:1.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva naahetukañca nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva nana ca hetu nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva naahetukañca nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo ca naahetuko ceva nana ca hetu nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana9.7:2.1.pli: Naahetukañceva nana ca hetuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva nana ca hetu nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana9.7:3.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca nakusalañca naahetukañceva nana ca hetuṁ nakusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.7:5.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.7:7.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.8:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.8:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.8:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.8:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.8:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naahetuko naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Ekapañhameva. Etena upāyena kusalākusaladukaṁ kusalattikameva ettha vaṭṭati.)

patthana9.9:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana9.9:5.1.pli: Nasappaṭighaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… naappaṭighaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.9:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.9:7.1.pli: Narūpiṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… naarūpiṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.9:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana9.9:9.1.pli: Nalokiyaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nalokuttaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana9.9:10.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana9.9:11.1.pli: Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …pe… nanakenaci viññeyyaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)
